scripts.setup: yarn clean && yarn install:deps && yarn build:internal && yarn setup:finalize
scripts.dev: yarn prune:workspaces && yarn workspace @stacks/types run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/translations run build && yarn workspace @stacks/db run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/license run build && concurrently -n libs,app,server -c cyan,green,magenta "yarn dev:libs" "yarn dev:app:watch" "yarn workspace @stacks/server run dev"
scripts.dev:libs: concurrently -n types,translations -c blue,yellow "yarn workspace @stacks/types run dev" "yarn workspace @stacks/translations run dev"
scripts.dev:app: yarn workspace @stacks/translations run build && yarn workspace @stacks/app run start
scripts.dev:server: yarn prune:workspaces && yarn workspace @stacks/types run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/translations run build && yarn workspace @stacks/db run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/license run build && yarn workspace @stacks/server run dev
scripts.dev:email: yarn prune:workspaces && yarn workspace @stacks/types run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/db run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/email-service run dev
scripts.dev:email:templates: yarn workspace @stacks/types run compile && yarn workspace @stacks/email-service run dev:email
scripts.build:internal: yarn build:types && yarn install --mode=skip-build && yarn build:db && yarn build:license && yarn build:translations
scripts.build: yarn install && yarn build:internal && yarn build:app && yarn build:server && yarn build:email-service
scripts.release: yarn clean && yarn install && yarn build:internal && yarn build:app && yarn build:server && yarn build:email-service && yarn release:structure && yarn release:server && yarn release:app && yarn release:email-service && yarn release:db && yarn release:legal && yarn release:docker
scripts.release:structure: mkdir -p releases && mkdir -p releases/server && mkdir -p releases/server/app && mkdir -p releases/email-service && mkdir -p releases/db
scripts.release:docker: cp docker/* releases/ && cp docker/.env.example releases/
scripts.release:server: cp -R packages/server/dist/* releases/server/ && cp packages/server/public.pem releases/server/
scripts.release:legal: cp LICENSE NOTICE releases/server/ && cp LICENSE NOTICE releases/email-service/ && cp LICENSE NOTICE releases/db/ && cp LICENSE NOTICE releases/
scripts.run:copy: cp packages/server/.env releases && cp packages/server/license.key releases
